scenarios.title: Consistent /src layout
scenarios.expected: Expected no recommendation to rename to /source.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-repo-structure. Scenario: Consistent /src layout. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no recommendation to rename to /source.

scenarios.title: Generated benchmark output committed under source folder
scenarios.expected: Expected finding to move generated outputs to /artifacts and gitignore.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-repo-structure. Scenario: Generated benchmark output committed under source folder. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected finding to move generated outputs to /artifacts and gitignore.

scenarios.title: Clean standard layout
scenarios.expected: Expected zero findings for a clean, proportionate repository structure.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-repo-structure. Scenario: Clean standard layout. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected zero findings for a clean, proportionate repository structure.

scenarios.title: Missing /tests directory alongside /src
scenarios.expected: Expected finding recommending separation of source and test code.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-repo-structure. Scenario: Missing /tests directory alongside /src. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected finding recommending separation of source and test code.

scenarios.title: Agent suggests arbitrary folders when unneeded
scenarios.expected: Expected false-positive rejection; do not suggest /docs or /scripts unless there is content for them.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-repo-structure. Scenario: Agent suggests arbitrary folders when unneeded. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected false-positive rejection; do not suggest /docs or /scripts unless there is content for them.
